challenger_questions.question: The description of MAIN-PARA states that the program checks if both approved and declined authorization counts are zero (PA-APPROVED-AUTH-CNT <= 0 AND PA-APPROVED-AUTH-CNT <= 0). Should the second condition be PA-DECLINED-AUTH-CNT <= 0? Please verify the logic.
